description: Level warp/transition definitions — visual offsets and target areas.

Name.description: Internal name identifier. Not read by 1.13c engine

Id.description: Unique numeric ID. Not read by 1.13c engine

SelectX.description: X pixel offset for the warp clickable selection area. Not read by 1.13c engine

SelectY.description: Y pixel offset for the warp clickable selection area. Not read by 1.13c engine

SelectDX.description: Width in pixels of the warp clickable selection area. Not read by 1.13c engine

SelectDY.description: Height in pixels of the warp clickable selection area. Not read by 1.13c engine

ExitWalkX.description: X tile offset where the player appears after warping. Not read by 1.13c engine

ExitWalkY.description: Y tile offset where the player appears after warping. Not read by 1.13c engine

OffsetX.description: X tile offset for the warp visual position. Not read by 1.13c engine

OffsetY.description: Y tile offset for the warp visual position. Not read by 1.13c engine

LitVersion.description: Whether this warp has an alternate lit (highlighted) visual version

Beta.description: Beta content flag (unused). Not read by 1.13c engine
